site.title: Echo | John Ogletree - Digital Creator & Designer
site.description: Welcome to Echo, the personal portfolio of John Ogletree. Explore my creations in web design, development, and digital strategy.
site.keywords: John Ogletree, Portfolio, Web Developer, UI/UX Designer, Digital Creator, JavaScript, Georgia
site.author: John Ogletree

hero.description: Welcome to Echo, the personal portfolio of John Ogletree. I build modern, high-performance web experiences that blend aesthetic design with technical excellence.

items.title: Web Design & Development
items.description: Crafting responsive, high-performance websites from scratch. I focus on clean code and user-centric design to build digital experiences that work beautifully on any device.

items.title: Interactive Prototyping
items.description: Bringing ideas to life with high-fidelity, clickable prototypes. This crucial step allows for user testing and validation before a single line of code is written.

items.title: Digital Strategy & Consultation
items.description: Leveraging user research and analytics to help you make informed decisions. I provide insights that align your digital presence with your business goals for measurable success.

items.title: Echo - Personal Portfolio
items.description: The very website you are on. A fully responsive personal hub built with Astro, showcasing a blend of design and modern web technologies.

items.title: QuantumLeap - SaaS Dashboard
items.description: A UI/UX concept for a next-generation analytics platform, focusing on data visualization and intuitive user workflows.
items.imageAlt: Analytics dashboard with charts and graphs

items.title: CodeGenius - AI Assistant UI
items.description: An interface design for an AI-powered code completion tool, designed to be unobtrusive yet powerful for developers.
items.imageAlt: Laptop with code and abstract shapes

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.description: Have a question or a project in mind? Let's talk. I'm always open to discussing new ideas and opportunities.

newsletter.title: Join My Newsletter
newsletter.description: Subscribe to receive updates on my latest projects, articles, and design resources directly in your inbox. No spam, ever.
newsletter.privacy: Your privacy is important. I'll never share your email.

items.title: Dune: A Masterclass in World-Building
items.excerpt: Denis Villeneuve's adaptation of the sci-fi epic is a cinematic triumph, blending stunning visuals with a deeply resonant narrative.

items.title: The M4 AstroBook: A Developer's Dream?
items.excerpt: After a month with Apple's latest hardware, I'm sharing my thoughts on its performance and suitability for web development.

items.title: Finding Creative Flow in Augusta
items.excerpt: How the quiet charm of Martinez and the surrounding area has reshaped my daily process and inspiration.

items.question: What is your current availability for new projects?
items.answer: I am currently available for new freelance projects and contract roles. If you have an interesting challenge, feel free to reach out via the contact form above.

items.question: What technologies are you most excited about right now?
items.answer: I'm particularly excited about the evolution of edge computing and frameworks like Astro. On the design front, I'm closely following advancements in generative AI tools.

items.question: Where are you located?
items.answer: I am based in Martinez, Georgia, and am available for remote work globally. I am also open to hybrid opportunities in the Augusta metropolitan area.

items.question: Can we see more of your work?
items.answer: Absolutely! You can view a more extensive collection of my work on the dedicated creations page.

brand.name: Echo
brand.tagline: Building the next generation of digital experiences through design, code, and strategy.
